source_title: Global Fund-UNOPS six-plant programme site list
metric: Programme sites already in the 2022 strategy public PSA inventory
source_reference: NMOSP 2022 public plant inventory; UNOPS releases
notes: The 2022 strategy lists Chinsali, Kalindawalo, and National Heart Hospital among its 10 existing public PSA plants. Three of six programme sites therefore already had installed plants at the plan baseline; only Kasama, Kabwe, and St Paul's are clearly new sites. Net-new capacity is unconfirmed without MOH clarification.

source_title: Search-cutoff verification of circulating claims (17 Jul 2026)
metric: Claim: 6 functional plants in 2021 grew to 35 PSA plants
source_reference: Searched MOH, World Bank, WHO, Global Fund, UNOPS, UNICEF, PATH, Unitaid, CHAI, CHAZ, National Assembly, academic and news archives
notes: No primary source directly states 35 PSA plants. Reconciled records identify at least 27 distinct facility sites with installed or commissioned PSA plants by April 2026, so 35 is plausible if additional public/private sites exist, but current functionality is unknown. Requires MOH confirmation.
